Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jai clan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Jai clan is part of the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — The Jai clan is a faction in the Alliance camp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Sen wants Lindon and Yerin to work for the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan is a first-class clan in the Blackflame Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan originated in the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan uses light-aspected combat techniques on their Path of the Stellar Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan moved their main branch to the Blackflame Empire after producing an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan is a group that Lindon and Yerin avoided staying with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan is allied with the Sandviper sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 9''' — The Jai clan has specific spear techniques represented by a twisting line of starlight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 14''' — The Jai clan is a group that Eithan considers suitable for a specific spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Long has status within the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Jai clan possesses a spear with specific bindings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — The Jai clan is a group of people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Long is formerly of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Jai clan has a head branch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Jai clan is described as legendary.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — The Jai clan has refiners and Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Jai clan has a presence at the border.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — The Jai clan has seized assets from Eithan's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan wears sky blue robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan has black hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan's emblem is a star-and-spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan warriors use tall spears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan is equipped for battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan uses the Star Lance technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Gokren pulled arms on the Jai clan for Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — The Jai clan has nearly declared war on Eithan's family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Long has been killing Jai clansmen in their homes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan has an exile.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan has palaces on the mountain peak in Serpent's Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan has a second-ranked auction house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan has publicly proposed that the Redflower family supervise sanitation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — The Jai clan contains Highgolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 9''' — The Path of the Broken Star is trained in a secret city lost to the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Jai clan has members who are Lowgolds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — The Jai clan seized the last refinery in Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — The Jai clan main complex occupies the highest peak of Shiryu Mountain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Jai clan has slowed its aggression.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Jai clan is being waged a guerilla war against by Jai Long and the Sandvipers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Jai clan is hunting anyone wearing a black crescent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Jai clan was reclaiming their territory with ruthless efficiency.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 18''' — The Jai clan is led by Patriarch Jai Daishou.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — The Jai clan has spear arts passed down for generations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — The Jai clan is an ancient clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — A Jai clan warrior in blue held a spear at Lindon's chest.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou wants his clan to outlive him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Jai Daishou belongs to the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Jai clan territory includes a lake and miles of underground tunnel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 3''' — The Jai clan is a group that Lindon mentions sending ashes to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan is a great family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 6''' — The Jai clan exiled Jai Long to the Desolate Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai clan is the lowest-ranked of the great clans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — The Jai clan's net is something the characters intend to escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 16''' — The Jai clan is crumbling in the west.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Jai clan has fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Akura family aims to replace the Jai clan in the Uncrowned King tournament.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Jai clan has an invader in the Valley.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Jai clan wore blue and carried spears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — The Jai clan has members with spiritual senses.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — The Jai clan once owned the aura chamber used by Jai Long.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Jai clan once attacked the Arelius family.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
